summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Paint Shop visual configurator. ALL 14 features tested and PASSING. All visual customizations produce clear, immediate visual changes on the truck models.
critical_code_review_comments: All visual customization features are working correctly with immediate visual feedback
mix-blend-mode: multiply technique successfully colors truck body while keeping black background intact
All 6 truck models load and display correctly with color overlay
Wrap patterns use overlay blend mode and are visible on colored truck areas
Accessories (awning, LED, signage, racing stripe) render as absolute positioned elements outside blend group
test_credentials: No authentication required for Paint Shop features
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Paint Shop visual configurator features verified working. No issues found.

1_Paint_Color_No_Background_Bleed.details: Paint color applies ONLY to truck body. Background remains BLACK on all 6 truck models. Tested with #CE2029 (red), #4169E1 (blue), #228B22 (green), #FF0000 (pure red)

2_All_7_Finish_Types.details: All 7 finish types selectable and change truck appearance via CSS filters: Matte, Gloss, Metallic, Chrome, Enamel, Satin, Pearl

3_Two_Tone_Paint_Toggle.details: Toggle enables secondary color picker and split pattern options. Secondary Color section and Split Pattern section appear when enabled

4_Wrap_Patterns.details: All 9 wrap patterns selectable and visible on truck: No Wrap, Horizontal Stripes, Diagonal Stripes, Carbon Fiber, Polka Dots, Hex Grid, Chevrons, Brushed Metal, Camo

5_Wrap_Opacity_Slider.details: Wrap opacity slider adjusts pattern visibility from 0% to 100%

6_Racing_Stripe_Toggle.details: Racing stripe toggle shows visible horizontal stripe across truck with width options (Thin/Medium/Bold) and color picker

7_Awning_Canopy_Toggle.details: Awning toggle shows visible awning at top of truck with style options (Solid/Striped/Scalloped) and color picker

8_LED_Underglow_Toggle.details: LED underglow toggle shows visible glow under truck with color picker

9_Roof_Signage_Toggle.details: Roof signage toggle shows 'OPEN' sign at top of truck with illuminated option checkbox

10_Business_Name_Text_Input.details: Business name text input in Text tab shows text on truck in real-time. Tested with 'TACO TRUCK'. Font style, text color, text size, and text outline options all work

11_All_6_Truck_Models.details: All 6 truck models selectable and load properly: Classic Step Van, Modern Sprinter Van, Large Box Truck, Compact Transit Van, Retro Airstream, Open-Air Trailer

12_Color_Wheel_HSV.details: Color wheel (HSV) works for custom color selection. Hue ring and SV square both functional. HEX input accepts valid hex codes

13_Preset_Color_Palettes.details: All 6 preset palettes load and swatches are clickable: Classic Fleet, Copper & Steel, Street Food, Coastal, Luxury, Neon City

14_Save_and_Reset_Buttons.details: Save button saves design and shows 'Design saved successfully!' toast. Reset button resets to defaults (#FFFFFF) and shows 'Design reset to defaults' toast

console_errors.details: Only expected 401 errors from unauthenticated API calls. No React warnings or errors
